title: ScafandrMod
description: This mod adds mechanics from the "Point of No Return" season by MrLololoshka and Storytelling Team.
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bed74ea8c06415ec8ebaf7cb0d5b316e801691e.png)
This mod adds mechanics from the "Point of No Return" season by MrLololoshka and Storytelling Team. When you first enter the world, you'll spawn in a bunker, and your goal is to slay a dragon and create a device to restore the world.

**[ST]Drive** needs to be installed for playing.
![Car](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f041abd6accb8a2ac05441b186e2ce54e87417a_0.webp)

The spacesuit is a **_crucial_** part of the mod! The starting bunker will contain five spacesuits, only one of which is functional. You can repair non-functional spacesuits at the station to upgrade them in the bunker. A spacesuit's charge is depleted depending on the hazard level _(1 - 5)_; if the hazard level is higher than the spacesuit's, the charge will be depleted excessively. The bunker also houses a charging station for spacesuits, which charges at a rate of _0.11%_ per tick. You can also craft and use portable batteries for on-the-go charging.
![Scafandr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c24b5c074a86e6d22e5db71e9670163661629174_0.webp)

For more detailed information, you can watch the video review on YouTube.
